channel.title: LVMLabs – HAM
channel.description: Recent content in HAM on LVMLabs

item.title: Amateur Radio Band Conditions
item.description:
{{ $url := “https://www.hamqsl.com/solarxml.php" }} {{ $res := resources.GetRemote $url }}

{{ if $res }} {{ $data := $res.Content | transform.Unmarshal }} {{ $solar := $data.solardata }}

Solar-Terrestrial Data

Updated: {{ $solar.updated }} 
<!-- Main Indices Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
  <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-neutral-900/50">
    <div class="text-sm opacity-70">SFI</div>
    <div class="text-2xl font-mono font-bold text-primary-600">{{ $solar.solarflux }}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-neutral-900/50">
    <div class="text-sm opacity-70">Sunspots</div>
    <div class="text-2xl font-mono font-bold">{{ $solar.sunspots }}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-neutral-900/50">
    <div class="text-sm opacity-70">A-Index</div>
    <div class="text-2xl font-mono font-bold">{{ $solar.aindex }}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-neutral-900/50">
    <div class="text-sm opacity-70">K-Index</div>
    <div class="text-2xl font-mono font-bold">{{ $solar.kindex }}</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
  <!-- HF Band Conditions -->
  <div class="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-slate-100 dark:bg-neutral-800 px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-sm">HF Conditions</div>
    <table class="w-full text-sm">
      <tbody class="divide-y">
        {{ range $solar.calculatedconditions.band }}
        <tr>
          <td class="px-4 py-2 font-medium">{{ .name }}</td>
          <td class="px-4 py-2 uppercase text-right">{{ .time }}</td>
          <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right font-bold">
            <span class="{{ if eq . "#text" "Good" }}text-emerald-500{{ else if eq . "#text" "Fair" }}text-amber-500{{ else }}text-red-500{{ end }}">
              {{ . "#text" }}
            </span>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {{ end }}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Atmospheric Status -->
  <div class="space-y-4">
    <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl">
      <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-1">Geomag Field</div>
      <div class="font-bold">{{ $solar.geomagfield }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl">
      <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-1">Signal Noise</div>
      <div class="font-bold">{{ $solar.signalnoise }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="p-4 border rounded-xl">
      <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-1">Solar Wind</div>
      <div class="font-bold font-mono">{{ $solar.solarwind }} <span class="text-xs font-normal">km/s</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{{ else }}

Error: Could not fetch solar data.

{{ end }}
